label: false-dup
a: API error responses use the format: {"error": {"code": "VALIDATION_ERROR", "message": "...", "fields": {"email": "required"}}}. The code field is a machine-readable enum for programmatic handling.
b: Backend error logging format: when an unhandled exception occurs, log {"level": "ERROR", "correlation_id": "...", "service": "...", "error": {"type": "...", "message": "...", "stack": "..."}}. The correlation_id links the error log to the request that triggered it.
reviewer_notes: Different schemas for different audiences: A is the client-facing API error envelope; B is the server-side error log shape.
